symptom: hard lumps on the jaw and teeth that would not come in
hook: the jaw was packed with extra teeth and dense bony bumps
whatYouSee: A jaw crowded with many extra unerupted teeth and several dense bony lumps.
whyItMatters: Gardner syndrome also fills the bowel with polyps that can turn into cancer so the teeth can be the first warning.
treatment: The teeth and lumps are managed by the dentist but the bigger step is a referral.
takeaway: A jaw full of extra teeth and bony lumps can be a sign of Gardner syndrome.

condition.keyFindings: several dense bony osteomas in the jaws along with multiple extra unerupted and supernumerary teeth scattered through both jaws

generated.threadsCaption:
A young patient had hard lumps on the jaw and teeth that would not come in.

Then the X-ray loaded 😳

And the jaw was packed with extra teeth and dense bony bumps.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What is the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Gardner syndrome

👀 What you see:
A jaw crowded with many extra unerupted teeth and several dense bony lumps called osteomas.

💊 Treatment:
The teeth and lumps are managed by the dentist but the bigger step is a referral.

🦴 Why it matters:
Gardner syndrome also fills the bowel with polyps that can turn into cancer so the teeth can be the first warning.
generated.ctaText:
This patient's weird teeth were the first warning of a serious disease.

How many real symptoms get brushed off as "just anxiety"?

So I made a card game about exactly that.

It's Just Anxiety. The medical gaslighting game.

Grab it if it hits home 🙏
